campaign.name: Smoke Test Co: Quality Without the Complexity
campaign.objective: Generate 500 qualified trial signups from mid-market engineering teams within 90 days
campaign.targetAudience: Engineering managers, QA leads, and DevOps engineers at 50-500 employee B2B SaaS companies experiencing slow CI/CD pipelines, false positive tests, and fragmented testing tooling
campaign.positioning: The fastest way to catch breaking changes with intelligent false-positive detection and enterprise-grade reliability—starting in 10 minutes, not 10 weeks
keyMessages: Eliminate 95% of flaky tests with intelligent false-positive detection
Start testing in 10 minutes with one-click GitHub, GitLab, and Jenkins integration
Enterprise reliability without enterprise complexity—transparent pricing with no hidden costs
campaign.timeline: 90 days: Days 1-30 launch landing page and content hub, Days 31-60 activate LinkedIn ads and email nurture, Days 61-90 optimize based on conversion data

contentPlan.title: The Real Cost of Flaky Tests: Why Your CI/CD Pipeline is Losing Money
contentPlan.purpose: Top-of-funnel awareness piece that quantifies the financial impact of false positives

contentPlan.title: 5 Signs Your API Testing Strategy is Broken
contentPlan.purpose: Middle-of-funnel consideration piece that self-identifies common testing problems
contentPlan.channel: Company blog with Reddit r/devops sharing

contentPlan.title: How Mid-Size Engineering Teams Are Cutting Testing Time by 60%
contentPlan.purpose: Social proof and credibility building with case study format
contentPlan.channel: Company blog with email nurture distribution

contentPlan.title: False Positive Reduction: A Step-by-Step Guide
contentPlan.purpose: High-value downloadable that demonstrates technical depth and solves immediate problems

contentPlan.title: Smoke Test Co vs. Postman: Real-World Comparison for API Testing
contentPlan.purpose: Bottom-of-funnel decision aid that addresses competitive objections
contentPlan.channel: Dedicated landing page with SEO targeting

landingPages.headline: API Testing That Actually Works
landingPages.subheadline: Catch breaking changes faster with intelligent false-positive detection
landingPages.valueProposition: Start testing in 10 minutes with enterprise reliability. 95% fewer flaky tests, works with your existing CI/CD, transparent pricing with no hidden costs.

landingPages.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
landingPages.subheadline: Choose the plan that fits your team. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
landingPages.valueProposition: Free tier for individuals. Pro tier for growing teams. Team tier for 5+ developers. Enterprise tier with custom SLAs.

landingPages.headline: See Smoke Test Co in Action
landingPages.subheadline: 15-minute personalized demo showing how we eliminate false positives
landingPages.valueProposition: Book a demo and see how engineering teams like yours reduce testing time by 60% and eliminate flaky tests forever.

scoringCriteria.action: Job title: Engineering Manager, QA Lead, DevOps Lead

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 60 AND (demo_booked == true OR trial_started == true AND days_active >= 7)
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1. Lead scoring automation triggers SQA flag in CRM 2. Sales Operations team reviews lead within 2 hours (80+), 8 hours (60-79), 24 hours (40-59) 3. AE receives Slack notification with lead score, engagement history, and pain point indicators 4. AE contacts lead via preferred channel (email first, then phone/Slack if available) 5. AE schedules discovery call within 24 hours 6. CRM auto-updates with conversation notes and next steps
